summary: Comprehensive responsive layout testing for Arabic RTL Crowd Services Platform. Tested mobile (390px iPhone 14), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px) viewports. All bottom navigation bar, prayer rounds scroll, map height, panel toggle, and responsive layout tests PASSED.

issues: MINOR: navigation.slice(0,4) renders 3 NavLinks (not 4) because API menu has only 3 primary items. Bottom nav shows 3 nav items + More = 4 total, vs expected '4 nav items + More'. Not a code bug, just config — may need 4th primary menu item to be added to sidebar menu if requirement is strictly 4+More.

mobile_390px.login_page_layout: PASS - clean single-column RTL layout, no horizontal overflow
mobile_390px.login_functionality: PASS - form fills and submits correctly
mobile_390px.bottom_nav_visible: PASS - visible at y=779, height=65px, width=390px (at viewport bottom)
mobile_390px.bottom_nav_more_opens_drawer: PASS - mobile sidebar opens (translate-x-0 confirmed), close button visible
mobile_390px.main_content_padding_bottom: PASS - 96px padding-bottom (well above 65px bottom nav height)
mobile_390px.prayer_rounds_scroll: PASS - scrollWidth=532 > clientWidth=340, overflowX=auto, no-scrollbar class present
mobile_390px.archive_calendar_order: PASS - computed order:2 for archive (shows below main content on mobile)
mobile_390px.main_content_order: PASS - computed order:1 for main content (shows first on mobile)
mobile_390px.tab_buttons_flex: PASS - flex: '1 1 0%', minWidth: auto (flex-1 correctly used)
mobile_390px.density_panel_toggle: PASS - panel toggles between translateX(0px) and translateX(100%)
mobile_390px.density_panel_backdrop: PASS - backdrop rgba(0,0,0,0.2) with absolute inset-0 z-20 when panel open

tablet_768px.bottom_nav_visible: PASS - visible at y=959, height=65px (at 1024 viewport bottom)
tablet_768px.desktop_sidebar_hidden: PASS - hidden at 768px (lg:flex not triggered below 1024px)

desktop_1920px.bottom_nav_hidden: PASS - not visible (lg:hidden class correctly hides it)

css_variables.map_container_h_mobile: PASS - var(--map-container-h) = min(450px, calc(100svh-340px)), rendered as 450px
css_variables.no_scrollbar_class: PASS - .no-scrollbar class applied to prayer rounds container
css_variables.pb_safe: PASS - bottom nav uses env(safe-area-inset-bottom) for safe area

code_review_confirms.bottom_nav_code: Layout.jsx lines 481-537: lg:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 - CORRECT
code_review_confirms.main_content_padding: Layout.jsx line 476: pb-24 lg:pb-6 = pb-24 on mobile (96px) - CORRECT
code_review_confirms.prayer_scroll: DailySessionsPage.jsx line 878: flex overflow-x-auto gap-2 pb-2 no-scrollbar sm:grid sm:grid-cols-6 sm:overflow-visible - CORRECT
code_review_confirms.archive_order: DailySessionsPage.jsx line 754: order-2 lg:order-first (archive below main on mobile) - CORRECT
code_review_confirms.flex1_tabs: DailySessionsPage.jsx line 792: flex items-center justify-center gap-2 (tabs use flex-1) - CORRECT

action_items: OPTIONAL: If spec requires exactly 4 nav items (not 3) in bottom nav, add a 4th primary menu item via admin sidebar settings. Currently only 3 primary nav items exist in the DB.
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: Bottom nav has navigation.slice(0,4) which correctly renders up to 4 items. However only 3 primary nav items exist in the current DB configuration, resulting in 3+More=4 total vs expected 4+More=5 total. Not a code bug.

INFO: The density tab panel backdrop uses 'absolute inset-0' (not 'fixed inset-0' as in code). At component level this works since the map container is absolute-positioned, but may not overlay the entire screen on very small viewports. Functionally working.
INFO: useIsMobile hook uses window resize event (no debounce) - could trigger frequent re-renders on window resize, but acceptable for current use.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All responsive layout features verified. Bottom nav: 3 NavLinks + More button (4 total) at mobile/tablet. Desktop sidebar works. Prayer rounds scrolls horizontally (532px > 340px container). Map height 450px at mobile. Archive shows below main content (order-2). Panel toggle (density tab) shows 92% width panel with backdrop on mobile. Tab buttons use flex-1. Login page clean on mobile. No horizontal overflow anywhere tested.
